<div>

1.  [Testování -- postup]{.text-T3}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr7 style="height:12.277cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:3.81cm; top:4.867cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Formulujeme
    testovanou (nulovou) a alternativní
    hypotézu]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Vybereme
    vhodný test (testové kritérium)]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Zvolíme
    hladinu významnosti ]{.text-T5}[α]{.text-T6}[ (obvykle 0,05 =
    5%)]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Sestrojíme
    kritický obor W]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Vypočítáme
    hodnotu testovacího kritéria]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[Učiníme
    závěr o prokázání či neprokázání alternativní hypotézy (zamítnutí či
    nezamítnutí nulové hypotézy)]{.text-T5}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

<div>

1.  [Testy shody]{.text-T22}

</div>
:::

<div>

${\chi = {\sum\limits_{i = 1}^{n}\frac{({A_{i} - E_{i}})^{2}}{E_{i}}}}{}$

</div>

:::

    γ]{.text-T28}[2]{.text-T34}

1.  [Funkce CHIDIST]{.text-T3}

</div>

:::
:::

::: {#page13 .page-dp3}

<div>

1.  [Neparametrické testy]{.text-T22}[ shody]{.text-T27}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page14 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr15 style="height:3.475cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:0.696cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Kolgomorov-Smirnovův test shody pro jeden výběr]{.text-T38}[
    ]{.text-T3}

</div>
:::

<div>

${{D_{1} = {\frac{1}{n} \cdot \text{max}}}{|{N_{a,j} - N_{e,j}}|}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page15 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr16 style="height:2.968cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:1.164cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Kolgomorov-Smirnovův test shody pro jeden výběr]{.text-T38}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr17 style="height:11.911cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.962cm; top:4.867cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[a) zvolíme
    hladinu významnosti ]{.text-T42}[]{.text-T43}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[b) výsledky
    měření rozdělíme do zvolených skupin
    (tříd)]{.text-T42}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[c)
    stanovíme příslušné očekávané četnosti]{.text-T42}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[d)
    vypočítáme jednotlivé kumulativní četnosti aktuální    
    (experimentální) a očekávané (teoretické)]{.text-T42}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[e)
    stanovíme absolutní hodnoty rozdílů kumulativních četností v každé
    skupině]{.text-T42}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[f) v
    tabulce vyhledáme příslušnou kritickou hodnotu
    D]{.text-T42}[]{.text-T44}[,]{.text-T45}[]{.text-T44}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.948cm;"}[g) je-li
    D]{.text-T42}[1]{.text-T45}[ ]{.text-T42}[]{.text-T46}[
    ]{.text-T47}[D]{.text-T48}[]{.text-T49}[,]{.text-T47}[]{.text-T49}[,
    zam]{.text-T48}[ítáme H]{.text-T42}[0]{.text-T45}[ a tvrdíme, že
    experimentální a očekávané četnosti se statisticky významně
    liší]{.text-T42}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page16 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr18 style="height:2.122cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.962cm; top:0.736cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Kol]{.text-T50}[m]{.text-T51}[o]{.text-T50}[g]{.text-T51}[orov-Smirnovův
    test shody pro dva výběry]{.text-T50}[ ]{.text-T3}

</div>
:::

<div>

${{D_{2} = \text{max}}{|{F_{1,j} - F_{2,j}}|}}{}$

</div>

<div>

${{D_{2;0,\text{05}} = 1},\text{36}\sqrt{\frac{n_{1} + n_{2}}{n_{1}\text{.}n_{2}}}\begin{matrix}
 & 
\end{matrix}{D_{2;0,\text{01}} = 1},\text{63}\sqrt{\frac{n_{1} + n_{2}}{n_{1}\text{.}n_{2}}}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page17 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr15 style="height:3.475cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:0.696cm; "}
<div>

1.  [t-test pro párované hodnoty (parametrický)]{.text-T38}[ ]{.text-T3}

</div>
:::

<div>

${t = \frac{{|\overline{d}|}\text{.}\sqrt{n - 1}}{s_{d}}}{}$

</div>

<div>

${s_{d} = \sqrt{\frac{\sum{d^{2} - \frac{({\sum{d)^{2}}}}{n}}}{n - 1}}}{}$

</div>

<div>

${|\overline{d}|}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page18 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:13.573cm;width:12.568cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.416cm; top:1.27cm; "}

[???]{title="sheet-name"}

Page [1]{title="page-number"}

[???]{title="sheet-name"}  ([???]{title="title"} )

[00/00/0000]{title="date"} , [00:00:00]{title="time"}

Page [1]{title="page-number"}  / [99]{title="page-count"}

  -------- ---------------- ----------------- ------------------------------------------------ ---------------- ---
  Dvoji    x[i]{.text-T1}   x[ii]{.text-T1}   d=x[i]{.text-T1}[ - x]{.text-T2}[ii]{.text-T3}   d[2]{.text-T4}    
  1        20.7             21.9              1.2                                              1.44              
  2        18.4             20.8              2.4                                              5.76              
  3        19.8             21.1              1.3                                              1.69              
  4        18.8             20.1              1.3                                              1.69              
  5        19.9             19.9              0                                                0                 
  6        23.4             24.4              1                                                1                 
  7        23.7             25.5              1.8                                              3.24              
  8        20.8             21.6              0.8                                              0.64              
  9        20               24.6              4.6                                              21.16             
  10       22               23.4              1.4                                              1.96              
  suma     207.5            223.3             15.8                                             38.58             
  průměr   20.75            22.33             1.58                                                               
                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                 
  -------- ---------------- ----------------- ------------------------------------------------ ---------------- ---

![](data:;base64,){style="height:13.573cm;width:12.568cm;"}
:::

<div>

${{s_{d} = \sqrt{\frac{\text{38},{\text{58} - \text{24}},\text{964}}{9}} = 1},\text{23}}{}$

</div>

<div>

${t = \frac{{|\overline{d}|}\text{.}\sqrt{n - 1}}{s_{d}} = \frac{\text{1,58}\sqrt{\text{10} - 1}}{\text{1,23}} = \text{3,85}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page19 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr10 style="height:2.121cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.587cm; top:0.947cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Wilcoxonův test pro párované hodnoty]{.text-T52}[ ]{.text-T3}

</div>
:::

<div>

${{\mu_{T} = \frac{n({n + 1})}{4}};\begin{matrix}
 \\

\end{matrix}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page20 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.963cm; top:0.846cm; "}
<div>

1.  [TEST VÝZNAMNOSTI ROZDĹU DVOU ROZPTYLU (Fischerův test =
    F-test)]{.text-T38}

</div>
:::

<div>

${F = \frac{s_{1}^{2}}{s_{2}^{2}}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page21 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.963cm; top:1.057cm; "}
<div>

1.  [TESTY VÝZNAMNOSTI ROZDÍLU DVOU
    PR]{.text-T54}[Ů]{.text-T55}[M]{.text-T54}[Ě]{.text-T55}[R]{.text-T54}[Ů]{.text-T55}[
    (Studentův test = t-test)]{.text-T54}

</div>
:::

<div>

${t = {\frac{|{{\overline{x}}_{1} - {\overline{x}}_{2}}|}{\sqrt{n_{1}{s_{1}^{2} + n_{2}}s_{2}^{2}}} \cdot \sqrt{\frac{n_{1}n_{2}({n_{1} + n_{2} - 2})}{n_{1} + n_{2}}}}}{}$

</div>

<div>

${}{}$

</div>

<div>

${t = \frac{|{x_{1} - x_{2}}|}{\sqrt{\frac{s_{1}^{2}}{n_{1} - 1} + \frac{s_{2}^{2}}{n_{2} - 1}}}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page22 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P21 .graphic-pr19 style="height:2.329cm;width:21.167cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.962cm; top:1.057cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Test nezávislosti]{.text-T22}[ ]{.text-T23}

</div>
:::

<div>

${{t = \frac{r}{\sqrt{1 - r^{2}}}}\sqrt{n - 2}}{}$

</div>

::: {.graphic-P23 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:15.24cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::
